entries.title: Commentary on Revelation on revelation 8:6
entries.excerpt: And the seven angels who had the seven trumpets prepared themselves to sound the trumpets. The Church, inflamed with the sevenfold spirit, prepared itself confidently to preach, intending to cast down the glory of the world with heavenly trumpets, as if to topple the walls of Jericho. For that seven-day circuit also indicates the entire time of the Church.

entries.title: Commentary on Revelation on revelation 8:6
entries.excerpt: Then the angels also sounded trumpets, signaling the presence of God (Ex. 19:16-19); for even then the trumpets sounded loudly.

entries.title: COMMENTARY ON THE APOCALYPSE 8:6 on revelation 8:6
entries.excerpt: The church, often indicated by the number seven, prepared herself for faithful preaching.
